description: Gate an AI agent's destructive actions behind human approval, with a tamper-evident log.
name: io.github.infraveilhq/agent-guard

environmentVariables.description: Severity at/above which an action is gated: none|low|medium|high|critical (default high).
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_GUARD_THRESHOLD

environmentVariables.description: enforce (block dangerous actions pending approval) or audit (log only, never block). Default enforce.
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_GUARD_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the ledger and approval queue (default ~/.infraveil-guard).
environmentVariables.name: INFRAVEIL_GUARD_HOME

title: Infraveil Agent Guard
